name: accounting firms processing 10–50 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 payrolls/month, payroll discrepancies cause late payments to employees. We provide anomaly detection instead of manual audits and checks.
problem_solved: Identifying payroll discrepancies in hours and deductions.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Identifying payroll discrepancies in hours and deductions.
